author: leon
name: PR #1850 PPM-D Byte Mixture + Anti-Hijack Gate (full val)
blurb: Anti-hijack guard on top of PR #1850's PPM-D byte-mixture: high-lambda branch is suppressed when the NN is already confident on the actual byte (-log p_NN < 0.40 bits). Same scoring scheme as #1850, full-val measurement (no subsetting), single-pass scoring with file-based 8-rank gather. Stackable with #1881 / #1877.
headline_metric: ppm_native_submission_val_bpb (PPM-D mixture, anti-hijack gated, full 47.85M val)
reproducibility_notes: CaseOps tokenizer + data prep are unchanged from 2026-04-27_050_PR1797_Base_BOS_Fix. Set PPM_NATIVE_ENABLED=1 plus the hyperparameters above and run train_gpt.py per seed.
